coolant_disclaimer: Already filled in on the vault
inside_vault_instructions: There is three symbol panels around the room, hit all 3.

coolant_disclaimer: Filled coolant can be found in small armouries at clearance 3. Empty coolant from Preservation, fill up at station at centre of Control where the contraband pickup is for 1 battery, or at spawn point in Biostock for 2 batteries
inside_vault_instructions: There will be a symbol on the wall, look for 3 terminals with the matching symbol and interact with them all. Panels are around to remove ice.

coolant_disclaimer: Already filled in on the vault
outside_vault_instructions: Boss location on the map in Optimization, Calibration, Stockpile or Repository. Don't necessarily need to kill the Warden but it will unblock the doors if you do. Alternative is to wait it out after picking up the required item (couple of minutes)
outside_vault_instructions_disclaimer: Level 4 scanner will show them, possibly level 3
inside_vault_instructions: There will be a symbol on the wall, look for 3 terminals with the matching symbol and interact with them all.

batteries_disclaimer: 6 for the door, 1 for the Panopticon
coolant_disclaimer: Already filled in on the vault
outside_vault_instructions: In the long ice hallway "Cold Storage" between Cargo and Index, shoot down the drone carrying a DNA sample. Take the sample to the top floor of Panopticon — 1 battery is needed to get colony credentials from the DNA.
outside_vault_instructions_disclaimer: Spawns enemies and locks you in
inside_vault_instructions: There will be a symbol on the wall, look for 3 terminals with the matching symbol and interact with them all.

coolant_disclaimer: Filled coolant can be found in small armouries at clearance 3. Empty coolant from Preservation, fill up at station at centre of Control where the contraband pickup is for 1 battery, or at spawn point in Biostock for 2 batteries
outside_vault_instructions: In rooms North and South of Control: "Tranquility Dormant" and "Tranquility Derelict". Tranquility credentials are at the side of the room.
outside_vault_instructions_disclaimer: Spawns a boss and locks you in
inside_vault_instructions: There will be a symbol on the wall, look for 3 terminals with the matching symbol and interact with them all.

location_disclaimer: Also from Tranquility Dormant (South), but Derelict is closer to the vault door
coolant_disclaimer: Filled coolant can be found in small armouries at clearance 3. Empty coolant from Preservation, fill up at station at centre of Control where the contraband pickup is for 1 battery, or at spawn point in Biostock for 2 batteries
outside_vault_instructions: Secret Lab above Preservation (NOT the Lab elevator) at the top of a very long ladder — inside one room will be 3 monitors displaying different symbols. Order of input matters: Left → Top → Right. Navigate to "Tranquility Dormant (North)" and enter the room with "Good Morning" written above. Proceed up elevator, kill the enemies that spawn (1 boss) to proceed. Locate the terminals with the corresponding symbols previously seen in the order they were displayed.
inside_vault_instructions: There will be a symbol on the wall, look for 3 terminals with the matching symbol and interact with them all.
